items.title: OpenAI Codex Goal Mode reaches general availability across app, IDE, and CLI

key_claims.claim: Goal Mode available in app, VS Code/JetBrains extension, CLI
Appshots: both Command keys attaches foreground app window

items.title: Walmart Sparky Q1 2026: weekly active users double, average order value 35% higher
items.publisher: Digital Commerce 360 (citing Walmart Q1 FY2026 earnings call)

key_claims.claim: Weekly active users more than doubled QoQ
Sparky users have ~35% higher average order value than non-users

caveats: Self-reported earnings call metrics; no independent attribution study; selection bias likely present

items.title: Salesforce Agentforce Coworker launches in beta inside every Salesforce search bar

key_claims.claim: Available for Agentforce Enterprise, Unlimited, Agentforce 1 editions

caveats: Beta; no pricing disclosed; Salesforce primary press release URL redirected

items.title: Gemini gains Canva integration (live now), CapCut and Adobe partnerships announced

key_claims.claim: Canva Connected App live since 19 May, limited English markets, all plans
CapCut partnership confirmed, no launch date

caveats: Only Canva is live; CapCut and Adobe have no scheduled release dates; Canva limited to English-speaking markets

items.title: ElevenReader secures 200,000 human-narrated titles at $11/month

key_claims.claim: 200,000 human-narrated titles licensed from major publishing houses

caveats: Publisher names not disclosed; catalog rollout date unspecified

items.title: TeamPCP supply chain worm hits GitHub internals and AI company SDKs
items.publisher: The Record from Recorded Future News

key_claims.claim: ~3,800 internal GitHub repos exfiltrated via Nx Console v18.95.0
170+ npm packages affected by worm propagation

caveats: GitHub investigation ongoing; customer data impact may be updated; OpenAI scope still being characterized

items.title: OpenAI files confidential IPO prospectus with SEC, targets September listing

key_claims.claim: S-1 filed 22 May 2026 with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley

key_claims.caveat: from reporting; actual prospectus not yet public

caveats: Confidential S-1 not yet public; all financials from reporting, not prospectus; CFO dissent sourced from reporting not public statement

limitations: openai.com/news returned 403; OpenAI items confirmed via CNBC and Codex changelog
Salesforce primary press release URL redirected; confirmed via developer docs and CEO announcement
X/LinkedIn/Discord not accessed directly; key handles checked via search-indexed posts
SEA/Indonesia search yielded no in-window AI product launches
Window overlap with 2026-05-22 and 2026-05-23 bulletins: Google I/O items and prior May 22 items excluded to avoid duplication
No new model releases in window; model-release category empty
No new MCP servers found beyond prior bulletins; mcp-ecosystem category empty
Walmart 35% AOV figure self-reported with no methodology disclosure; selection bias likely
TeamPCP investigation still ongoing at time of publication
